diagrams.title: CPSR Bit Field Layout
diagrams.description: Complete 32-bit CPSR register showing all bit positions and their meanings
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete structure of CPSR register and remember bit positions

diagrams.title: ARM Processor Modes
diagrams.description: Shows the 7 processor modes and their mode bit values
diagrams.purpose: Understand different processor modes and how they are selected

diagrams.title: Exception Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Sequence of operations when an exception occurs
elements: Mode bits change to exception mode
diagrams.purpose: Understand automatic saving/restoration of CPSR during exceptions
